case_title: SOFI CONSUMER LOAN PROGRAM GRANTOR TRUST 2016-2 VS. MICHAEL LAREZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 100026933), PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF SOFI CONSUMER LOAN PROGRAM GRANTOR TRUST 2016-2 SERVED NOV-07-2017, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON, MAILING DATE NOV-07-2017 AS TO DEFENDANT LAREZ, MICHAEL
